candidates.why: Primary revenue line with values that match top-line and are duplicated by 'Total operating revenue'; best canonical choice.
Revenue-like but appears to be a specific royalty component, not total revenue; use only if main 'Revenue' missing.
Component revenue category, not total revenue; lower priority fallback if total lines missing.
Total revenue line with identical values to 'Revenue'; good secondary choice if 'Revenue' missing in some years.
This is a cost line (likely COGS), not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Finance income, not operating revenue; not appropriate for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue; not suitable for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not P&L revenue; not appropriate as REVT.

variables.notes: Selected 'Revenue' as primary top-line with 'Total operating revenue' as a backup because they represent the same aggregate revenue measure; other candidates are components or non-revenue items.

candidates.why: Could be part of operating expenses or COGS, but label is generic and company-specific classification is unclear.
Typically part of SG&A or R&D rather than direct COGS; ambiguous here.
Likely broad personnel/operating expense, more SG&A-like than direct COGS for this type of business.
Appears to be SG&A/overhead, not clearly direct cost of sales.
Typical operating overhead, not direct production cost.
Clearly overhead; not direct COGS.
Administrative overhead (SG&A), not COGS.
Financing item, not COGS.
Foreign exchange, not COGS.
Overhead; not direct cost of sales.
Balance sheet accrual, not an income statement COGS line.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. The most conceptually correct direct cost of revenue line is 'Publisher and revenue share cost', which is not in the provided COGS candidate list. This appears to represent the primary variable cost tied to revenues (e.g., payments to content/publisher partners), fitting COGS better than the more generic operating expense lines in the candidate list. Flagged for manual review to confirm this classification and ensure it is not being treated as SG&A by the company. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Publisher and revenue share cost

candidates.why: Typical SG&A-type overhead bucket (selling, general and administrative and other operating expenses).
More granular other operating expenses; likely SG&A component.
Administrative expenses are classic SG&A.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Selected all three operating/administrative expense buckets as SG&A components, excluding totals and non-operating items, and leaving depreciation/impairments separate as required.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization related to R&D assets, but not the core current-period R&D expense line itself.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D; not the gross R&D expense line.
Direct R&D expense line in the income statement; best match for XRD.
Balance sheet capitalized R&D; not a period expense.
Accumulated amortization of capitalized R&D; balance sheet item, not current expense.

variables.notes: Used the explicit income statement 'Research & Development' line as the R&D expense; amortization-related and balance sheet R&D lines were not included.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best anchor for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses - excl Lease Interest Expense
candidates.why: Alternate interest expense presentation excluding lease interest; useful if main line missing or reclassified.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense specifically on lease liabilities; a component of total interest expense.
Net interest measure; could be needed in years when only net is reported.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense related to VAT case
candidates.why: Special interest expense related to tax dispute; potential component of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense related to contingent consideration
candidates.why: Specific interest-like expense on contingent consideration; component of interest expense.
Represents non-controlling interest, not interest expense.
Represents non-controlling interest share of income, not interest expense.
Explicit interest expense net of capitalized interest; relevant if populated.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful as a fallback component.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses - excl Lease Interest Expense
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
Interest Expense related to VAT case
Interest expense related to contingent consideration

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense labels, starting with the general 'Interest expenses' line, followed by net-of-capitalized, exclusionary, lease-specific, and special-case interest expense lines. Minority interest and equity items were excluded as they are not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the company
candidates.why: Directly represents equity attributable to owners (excludes non-controlling interests); ideal for BE.
Component of equity, but not total owners' equity.
Part of equity attributable to owners, but not the aggregate equity figure.
Total equity including any non-controlling interests; only use if no owners-only line is available.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders equity and liabilities Equity attributable to owners of the company
candidates.why: Label indicates equity attributable to owners; numerically matches total equity due to zero NCI but conceptually is owners' equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the company - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row for owners' equity; not preferred over the main owners' equity line.
Balancing item, not a primary financial statement line.
Balancing item, not the main equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item for the full statement, not equity alone.
Sum of equity and liabilities; not suitable for BE.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the company
Shareholders equity and liabilities Equity attributable to owners of the company

variables.notes: Chose the explicit owners-only equity line as primary BE, with the similarly-worded line that carries the numeric values as a backup. This ensures equity excludes non-controlling interests while accommodating label variations over time.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to minority interests; reflects flows, not balance sheet stock.
Income statement allocation of profit to minority interests; flow measure.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; best match for MIB stock.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation; not the balance sheet amount.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to balance sheet non-controlling interest lines only, as required to capture the equity stock attributable to minority interests and avoid mixing in income statement flow measures.
